title: Update preact-compat to version 3.8.2 🚀
body:
Hello lovely humans, [preact-compat](https://www.npmjs.com/package/preact-compat) just published its new version 3.8.2.
State Update :rocket:
Dependency preact-compat
New version 3.8.2
Type devDependency
This version is **not covered** by your **current version range**. Without accepting this pull request your project will work just like it did before. There might be a bunch of new features, fixes and perf improvements that the maintainers worked on for you though. I recommend you look into these changes and try to get onto the latest version of preact-compat. Given that you have a decent test suite, a passing build is a strong indicator that you can take advantage of these changes by merging the proposed change into your project. Otherwise this branch is a great starting point for you to work on the update. Do you have any ideas how I could improve these pull requests? Did I report anything you think isn’t right? Are you unsure about how things are supposed to work? There is a collection of [frequently asked questions](https://greenkeeper.io/faq.html) and while I’m just a bot, there is a group of people who are happy to teach me new things. [Let them know](https://github.com/greenkeeperio/greenkeeper/issues/new). Good luck with your project :sparkles: You rock! :palm_tree: --- The new version differs by 45 commits . - [`7c5de00`](https://github.com/developit/preact-compat/commit/7c5de00e7c85e2ffd011bf3af02899b63f699d3a) 3.8.2 - [`7caa6f7`](https://github.com/developit/preact-compat/commit/7caa6f746415fcfd52f2a61acb6ee4529e02221b) Always apply attribute normalization (oops) - [`be344a6`](https://github.com/developit/preact-compat/commit/be344a64faedc231015f6b7c25bf4085f8d3ce2d) Remove accidentally committed comments. - [`7c2d4b7`](https://github.com/developit/preact-compat/commit/7c2d4b77e7b5ec7034bb4c8808446c759e3631f1) 3.8.1 - [`9128829`](https://github.com/developit/preact-compat/commit/912882934eb07f7c0c94c5e2ea4d38c27675773f) ensure attributes/props are defined on all vnodes - [`1fa1400`](https://github.com/developit/preact-compat/commit/1fa1400e30e462079ad56c1384291d5681f50e9c) 3.8.0 - [`b0938f1`](https://github.com/developit/preact-compat/commit/b0938f1e10fbc1628a938802343ddb4d35416849) Refactor VNode normalization. /cc @devgeeks - [`d7f6904`](https://github.com/developit/preact-compat/commit/d7f6904f1e80547cc95554137f563344fb2b1e13) 3.7.1 - [`598de5c`](https://github.com/developit/preact-compat/commit/598de5c42ca73bde55c516ead2d28e142ed7a67f) 🔥 Double camelCase attribute normalization performance! Thanks @billneff79 👍 - [`26f3312`](https://github.com/developit/preact-compat/commit/26f3312df74e3fb92f39e5b03fb2662c8ddb31a0) 3.7.0 - [`2553ef2`](https://github.com/developit/preact-compat/commit/2553ef25cc5e786e4aa404ee4f57a3abc7c8180c) Avoid compat-normalizing VNodes representing pure functional components or components that don't inherit from Component. - [`4bd6658`](https://github.com/developit/preact-compat/commit/4bd665851c7bc8010575fef5f48ee05ccc94e7f3) Optimize hook performance. - [`5fc0224`](https://github.com/developit/preact-compat/commit/5fc02249c00f93e27e602d7d4edf8856b7bd5989) Transform pure functions to components in order to make keyed behavior match React's. This will likely be reversed in an upcoming release coordinated with preact's core. - [`e0bc12c`](https://github.com/developit/preact-compat/commit/e0bc12c662f0fd033f28b414dff1498c49615d12) Add support for deprecated camelCase'd SVG props. Fixes #222. - [`7402873`](https://github.com/developit/preact-compat/commit/7402873eaa03c2ba7269aa0eacd69b60791a4d06) Refactor VNode normalization: clone attributes less, separate handling of component and element VNodes, prevent against multiple normalization passes. There are 45 commits in total. See the [full diff](https://github.com/developit/preact-compat/compare/9bf4edfaa2828a6810e47b94064dc1719762c63d...7c5de00e7c85e2ffd011bf3af02899b63f699d3a). --- This pull request was created by [greenkeeper.io](https://greenkeeper.io/). Tired of seeing this sponsor message? :zap: `greenkeeper upgrade`
